case_title: ALLISON PARKER COBURN VS. PELLEGRINI PROPERTIES, L.P.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2009 - JUDGMENT.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PELLEGRINI PROPERTIES, L.P. HEARING SET FOR JUN-05-2009 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: HOLLI THIER. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY COBURN, ALLISON PARKER AS TO DEFENDANT PELLEGRINI PROPERTIES, L.P. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-13-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COBURN, ALLISON PARKER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PELLEGRINI PROPERTIES, L.P. $3,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $385.00 INTEREST, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,985.00, DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PELLEGRINI PROPERTIES, L.P. IS GRANTED. CONTINUED TO JUN-19-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN 506 FOR TRIAL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. JUDGE PRO TEM: BRAD KAPLAN. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORETD. (506)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE CLAIM HEARING OF JUN-19-2009 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM HOLLI THIER FILED BY COBURN, ALLISON PARKER
DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE WITH CERTIFICTE OF SERVICE BY MAIL BY ATTORNEY [C.C.P. 1013A(2)] FILED BY DEFENDANT PELLEGRINI PROPERTIES, L.P. AS TO PLAINTIFF COBURN, ALLISON PARKER
